subcodes.first_line: O servant of Baha! Praise be to God that thou hast attained unto the morn of guidance of His Holiness the Primal Point, my Most Exalted Lord, may my spirit be a sacrifice for Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده بهاء الحمد لله که بصبح هدی حضرت نقطه اولی ربی الاعلی روحی له الفداء
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @praise and encouragement, @call to action
